description: Matt Zenon Betz has been diagnosed with active pulmonary tuberculosis following positive sputum AFB smear and cavitary chest X-ray findings. As the public health epidemiologist, initiate the tuberculosis management protocol in GNU Health: document the TB diagnosis, start the intensive-phase RIPE regimen, order confirmatory sputum cultures, document household contact exposure for at-risk family members, and schedule the treatment response evaluation. Login: admin / gnusolidario.
